title: Average Notes
description: How many recent notes/keypresses are used for the rolling BPM average.

title: Timeline Window Seconds
description: How many seconds of the map timeline are visible in the moving graph window.

title: Y-Axis Headroom Percent
description: Extra space above the beatmap perfect BPM max. 0 means no extra space; 4 is the default; 50 is the maximum.

title: Y-Axis Curve
description: Controls non-linear y-axis scaling. 1 is linear; higher values give more visual space to high BPM.

title: Player Line Color
description: Color of the live Player BPM graph line.

title: Perfect Line Color
description: Color of the calculated Perfect BPM graph line.

title: Progress Marker Color
description: Color of the dotted current-time marker.

title: Grid Color
description: Color of the graph grid lines.

title: Axis Color
description: Color of the x and y axes.

title: Label Color
description: Color of graph labels and tick numbers.

title: Text Color
description: Color of the title, timer, and legend text.
